Explore the ci-header component structure in this Stencil web components project. I need to understand:

1. The ci-header component files (TSX, SCSS, etc.)
2. The ci-header-prerendered component if it exists
3. How the search bar is rendered in the header (look for the search input area)
4. How existing buttons/icons are positioned next to the search bar
5. The ci-dialog component (for the popup)
6. Any existing SVG icon patterns used in the project

Focus on finding the exact files and code sections where the search bar is rendered, so I can add a new button next to it. Also check how dialogs/modals are currently implemented.

content.text:
Now I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive report. ## Exploration Report: CI-Header Component Structure I've completed a thorough exploration of the ci-header component structure in this Stencil web components project. Here's what I found: --- ### 1. CI-HEADER Component Files **Location:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/ci-header-footer/src/components/ci-header/` **Key Files:** - **ci-header.tsx** (441 lines) - Main header component with grid-based layout - **ci-header.scss** (802 lines) - Comprehensive styling with grid templates, responsive breakpoints - **ci-header.spec.ts** - Test file - **ci-header.stories.ts** - Storybook stories - **readme.md** - Generated documentation **Component Tag:** `` --- ### 2. CI-HEADER-PRERENDER Component **Location:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/ci-header-footer/src/components/ci-header-prerender/` **Key Files:** - **ci-header-prerender.tsx** (439 lines) - Nearly identical to ci-header.tsx for SSG/pre-rendering - **ci-header-prerender.scss** - Styling for prerendered version - **ci-header-prerender-critical.css** - Critical CSS for inlining in `` **Component Tag:** `` **Key Difference:** Has `isItForPrerenderedView={true}` prop on ci-search component and customer contact/chat components to handle SSG rendering appropriately. --- ### 3. Search Bar Rendering **Location:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/ci-header-footer/src/components/ci-search/` **Files:** - **ci-search.tsx** (227 lines) - Algolia autocomplete integration - **ci-search.scss** (1,174 lines) - Comprehensive autocomplete styling with CSS variables **How It's Rendered in Header:** ```tsx // From ci-header.tsx line 415 {!this.simple && !this.isFramer && } ``` **CSS Grid Structure (ci-header.scss):** ```scss // Desktop layout (line 779-783) @media (min-width: 700px) { .ciHeader:not(.simple) { grid-template-areas: 'logo search favorites accounts cart'; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto auto auto; } } // Mobile layout (line 56-71) &:has(ci-search) { grid-template-areas: 'logo . favorites accounts cart' 'search search search search search'; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto auto auto; grid-template-rows: repeat(2, auto); } ``` **Search Input Details:** - Max width: 560px on desktop (line 46 in ci-search.scss) - Height: 40px (--aa-search-input-height) - Algolia autocomplete library with plugins: - Recent searches plugin - Query suggestions plugin - Redirect URL plugin - Detached mode on mobile (max-width: 699px) --- ### 4. Buttons/Icons Positioned Next to Search Bar **Existing Layout (from ci-header.scss):** The header uses a CSS Grid with `grid-template-areas`: ``` 'logo search favorites accounts cart' ``` **Positioned Elements (Right of Search):** 1. **ci-favorites** - Grid area: `favorites`, justify-self: center - Icon button component with inline SVG - Link-based (`` tag) - Analytics data attributes: `data-section="favorites"`, `data-link="favorites"` 2. **Accounts** - Grid area: `accounts` - Contains account button + caret dropdown - Uses ci-dialog for dropdown menu - Interactive keyboard navigation support 3. **ci-cart** - Grid area: `cart`, justify-self: end - Icon button with cart count badge - Optional detail popup with ci-dialog - Link-based navigation **Positioning Code (ci-header.scss lines 212-442):** ```scss ci-search { grid-area: search; justify-self: center; } ci-favorites { grid-area: favorites; justify-self: center; } ci-cart { grid-area: cart; justify-self: end; } ``` --- ### 5. CI-DIALOG Component (Modal/Popup System) **Location:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/ci-header-footer/src/components/ci-dialog/` **Files:** - **ci-dialog.tsx** (156 lines) - **ci-dialog.scss** (144 lines) **Component Tag:** `` **Key Features:** - Uses Shadow DOM (`shadow: true`) - Responsive behavior: - **Desktop (≥700px):** Renders as a flyout div (`.dialog-flyout`) - **Mobile (<700px):** Renders as `` native HTML element (modal) - Methods exposed via @Method(): - `openModal(event)` - Opens the dialog/flyout - `closeModal(event)` - Closes the dialog/flyout - `forceClose()` - Force close without state tracking **Template Structure:** ```tsx

Content goes here

Actions/buttons here
 ``` **Slots:** - `dialog-content` - Main content area - `dialog-actions` - Action buttons at bottom - Parts for styling: `header`, `content`, `actions`, `surface` **Desktop Flyout Styling (ci-dialog.scss):** ```scss .dialog-flyout { visibility: hidden; position: absolute; right: 0; z-index: 100; opacity: 0; transition: all 200ms ease-in-out; &--open { display: block; opacity: 1; visibility: visible; } } ``` **Mobile Modal Styling:** ```scss dialog { border-radius: 16px 16px 0px 0px; background: $neutral-background-primary; position: fixed; bottom: 0; top: auto !important; max-height: 80vh; } ``` **Example Usage in ci-accounts.tsx:** ```tsx {this.isUserLogged ? this.renderMyAccountMenu() : this.renderSignInMenu()} ``` --- ### 6. SVG Icon Patterns & Assets **Header SVG Assets Location:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/ci-header-footer/src/assets/header/` **Common Icon Files:** - `account.svg`, `account_grey.svg` - Account icon - `cart.svg`, `cart_grey.svg` - Shopping cart - `chat_bubble.svg` - Chat icon - `headset.svg` - Support/headset - `hamburger_menu.svg` - Mobile menu - `person.svg` - Person/profile icon - `phone_icon.svg` - Phone icon - `logout.svg` - Sign out icon - Arrow icons and more specialized icons **Import Pattern in TypeScript:** ```tsx import phone from '../../assets/header/phone_icon.svg'; import helpIcon from '../../assets/help-circle.svg'; import arrowDown from '../../assets/arrow_down.svg'; // Usage in JSX: ``` **SVG Inline Rendering Pattern (used in ci-favorites, ci-cart):** ```tsx ``` **Icon Button Styling:** ```tsx // From ci-favorites.tsx
Favorites ``` --- ### 7. How to Add a New Button Next to Search Bar **Key Implementation Steps:** 1. **Create Grid Area in SCSS:** - Add new grid area to `ci-header.scss` (line 40-41) - Example: `grid-template-areas: 'logo search [NEW_AREA] favorites accounts cart'` 2. **Component Structure Pattern:** - Follow ci-favorites or ci-cart pattern (both use `` or `
